$schema_comment: Canonical list of all protocol error codes. Layer 0 codes are relay-generated, including Layer 0.5 gateway-only discovery/signaling/invite control frames. Layer 2 codes are gateway-generated.

error_codes.meaning: Frame could not be parsed as JSON or is structurally malformed
Another gateway is already registered on this channel
Maximum number of channels on this relay has been reached
Maximum clients per channel has been reached
Frame payload exceeds the relay's --max-payload limit
Sender exceeded a relay rate limit
Client sent JOIN without a client_id field
Discoverable gateway registration omitted public_key
A discovery or signaling public key field is not a valid 32-byte base64 X25519 key
Gateway discovery metadata exceeds the relay size limit
The requested Layer 0.5 frame type is only available to registered gateway connections
The gateway is not currently bound as a discoverable identity on this relay
The requested target public key is not currently discoverable on this relay
The gateway has reached the relay limit for pending in-memory invites
The invite alias is missing, expired, consumed, or no longer attached to an active gateway
The requested method name is not recognized by the gateway
The request parameters are invalid or missing required fields
The gateway encountered an unexpected internal error
The request was cancelled by the client via a CANCEL frame
The gateway timed out processing the request
Client has not completed the Layer 1 handshake
Client is not authorized for the requested method
